emails.subject: RE: Ponderosa Pines Energy
emails.body: Chris, Can you reattach the file that Jeff sent. I believe it is the imbalance schedule I was looking for! Also, looking for some historical info. Did Joe Parks leave any history with regards to transactions in December or January?? Specifically, did Ponderosa through Enron sell any gas to third parties in those months?? MM To: 'jeffsmirin@txu.com@ENRON'; Kelly, Katherine L.; Denetsosie, Troy; Mazowita, Mike; Dinari, Sabra L.

emails.subject: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy
emails.body: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy Good thing you mentioned that. I can see that the attachment on this email is different than the one I sent before. I will be sending out another email this afternoon just introducing the "Enron" team to each other. To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy
emails.body: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy Imbalance numbers for April. To: Germany, Chris; Denetsosie, Troy; Kelly, Katherine L.; Dinari, Sabra L.

emails.subject: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy
emails.body: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy I was only able to sell 10,000 for Thursday. Looks like we are getting long on our imbalnce too. To: Denetsosie, Troy; Dinari, Sabra L.; Germany, Chris; vince.hawkes@naes.com

emails.subject: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy
emails.body: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy Please read the note below from Jeff at Lone Star, it looks like we may need to be particular for May. Of cause that would involve me knowing a little more about the pipeline.

emails.subject: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy
emails.body: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy I also have imbalance statements that I have received in the mail that I will be sending to Theresa. To: Germany, Chris; vince.hawkes@naes.com; Kelly, Katherine L.; Denetsosie, Troy

emails.subject: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy
emails.body: FW: Ponderosa Pines Energy Mike, I'm faxing you official statements from the pipeline and I'm going to mail them to Theresa Vos. To: Germany, Chris; Kelly, Katherine L.; Denetsosie, Troy
